text:
French security services have arrested an ultra-nationalist sympathiser in eastern France on suspicion of plotting attacks to take place during the Paris Olympics, Interior Minister Gerald Darmanin says.

“Bravo to the agents of the Ministry of the Interior who arrested an individual member of the ultra-right, suspected of wanting tocommit a violent action during the Olympic Games. We will continue our constant fight for the security of the French people,” Darmanin said on X.

The young man from the Alsace region, who was the administrator of a Telegram group called “French Aryan division” where he made threats against the Olympics, was being questioned by anti-terror police, French dailyLe Parisiensaid earlier.

The US plan would see Ukraine concede land for weaker-than-NATO security.
title: Frenchman arrested over suspected 2024 Olympics attack plot - NZ Herald
description: French security services have arrested an ultra-nationalist sympathiser in eastern France on suspicion of plotting attacks to take place during the Paris...
